title: 有馬記念(クラシック)にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen—a race where the competitors
are decided on by the fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan's achievements in the Classics have
been well received, and she's earned her place
here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! You'll be running in the Arima Kinen
too, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I worked myself too hard leading up to the
Kikuka Sho. Thus, I will be dedicating myself to
preparing for next year's important races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well then, good day. I hope you enjoy this
gathering of monstrous racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Monstrous racers... Is she referring to the seniors
running in the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's... Oguri Cap! The one everyone says is in
the "Beast" class.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone knows her. She's a super famous
megastar...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's so popular... And just look at that aura
she puts out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, y-yeah... I just realized what a crazy place I've
come to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Until now, going to the Classics and racing
McQueen was my everything. But there's so much
more out there besides that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen... So this is the Twinkle Series.
choice_data_list: Do you think you'll be okay?
Do you think you'll be okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, o-of course! I'm not gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm pretty scared. Oguri is—no, it's not just
Oguri. The competition here is endless...
